title: Chicken and Broccoli Stir-Fry
description: A quick and healthy stir-fry perfect for weeknight dinners.
instructions:
1. Slice chicken into thin strips and marinate in soy sauce and cornstarch for 10 minutes.
2. Heat vegetable oil in a wok over high heat.
3. Stir-fry garlic and ginger for 30 seconds.
4. Add chicken and cook until golden, about 5 minutes.
5. Add broccoli florets and stir-fry 3 minutes.
6. Season with sesame oil and additional soy sauce.
7. Serve over rice.

title: Tomato Basil Pasta
description: Classic Italian pasta with fresh tomatoes and basil.
instructions:
1. Cook pasta according to package instructions.
2. Heat olive oil in a pan and sauté garlic until fragrant.
3. Add diced tomatoes and cook for 10 minutes.
4. Season with salt, pepper, and fresh basil.
5. Toss with cooked pasta and serve with parmesan.

title: Veggie Omelette
description: Fluffy omelette packed with colorful vegetables.
instructions:
1. Whisk 3 eggs with salt and pepper.
2. Sauté diced bell peppers and onion in olive oil for 3 minutes.
3. Add spinach and cook until wilted.
4. Pour egg mixture over vegetables.
5. Sprinkle cheese and fold when almost set.
6. Cook 1 more minute and serve.

title: Lentil Soup
description: Hearty and nutritious lentil soup — great for using pantry staples.
instructions:
1. Sauté onion, garlic, carrots, and celery in olive oil for 5 minutes.
2. Add cumin and turmeric, cook 1 minute.
3. Add lentils, tomatoes, and broth.
4. Bring to a boil, reduce heat, simmer 25 minutes.
5. Season and blend partially for a creamy texture.
6. Serve with crusty bread.

title: Baked Salmon with Asparagus
description: Simple, elegant sheet-pan dinner with omega-rich salmon.
instructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
2. Place salmon and asparagus on a baking sheet.
3. Drizzle with olive oil, season with salt, pepper, and dill.
4. Add lemon slices and minced garlic.
5. Bake for 15-18 minutes until salmon flakes easily.
6. Serve immediately with lemon wedges.

title: Overnight Oats
description: Effortless make-ahead breakfast that keeps you full all morning.
instructions:
1. Combine oats, milk, yogurt, honey, and chia seeds in a jar.
2. Stir well, cover, and refrigerate overnight.
3. In the morning, top with sliced banana and berries.
4. Add extra milk if too thick.
5. Enjoy cold.

title: Black Bean Tacos
description: Quick vegan tacos with spiced black beans and fresh toppings.
instructions:
1. Drain and rinse black beans.
2. Heat beans with cumin and chili powder for 3 minutes.
3. Warm tortillas in a dry pan.
4. Mash avocado with lime juice and salt.
5. Assemble tacos with beans, avocado, tomatoes, onion, cilantro, and lettuce.
6. Serve with lime wedges.

title: Mushroom Risotto
description: Creamy Italian risotto with earthy mushrooms and parmesan.
instructions:
1. Sauté onion and garlic in olive oil for 3 minutes.
2. Add sliced mushrooms and thyme, cook 5 minutes.
3. Add arborio rice and stir 2 minutes.
4. Pour in wine and stir until absorbed.
5. Add warm broth one ladle at a time, stirring constantly.
6. Continue for 18-20 minutes until rice is al dente.
7. Stir in butter and parmesan. Season and serve.

title: Greek Salad
description: Refreshing Mediterranean salad with feta and olives.
instructions:
1. Chop cucumber, tomatoes, and red onion into chunks.
2. Combine in a bowl with olives and feta.
3. Drizzle with olive oil and lemon juice.
4. Season with oregano and salt.
5. Toss gently and serve immediately.

title: Banana Smoothie
description: Creamy energy-boosting smoothie for breakfast or a snack.
instructions:
1. Add all ingredients to a blender.
2. Blend until smooth and creamy.
3. Add ice if desired.
4. Pour into a glass and serve immediately.

title: Fried Rice
description: Classic fried rice — ideal for using leftover rice and vegetables.
instructions:
1. Heat oil in a wok over high heat.
2. Scramble eggs in oil, then push to the side.
3. Add garlic and cook 30 seconds.
4. Add mixed vegetables and stir-fry 3 minutes.
5. Add cold cooked rice and stir-fry 4 minutes.
6. Drizzle soy sauce and sesame oil.
7. Garnish with green onions and serve.

title: Spinach and Chickpea Curry
description: Rich, satisfying vegan curry with warming spices.
instructions:
1. Sauté onion, garlic, and ginger in oil for 5 minutes.
2. Add spices and cook 1 minute.
3. Add tomatoes and cook 5 minutes.
4. Add chickpeas and coconut milk.
5. Simmer 15 minutes.
6. Stir in spinach until wilted.
7. Serve with rice or naan.

title: Avocado Toast
description: Simple, nutrient-dense breakfast on toasted sourdough.
instructions:
1. Toast bread slices until golden.
2. Mash avocado with lemon juice and salt.
3. Spread avocado on toast.
4. Top with a poached or fried egg.
5. Sprinkle red pepper flakes and serve.

title: Minestrone Soup
description: Italian vegetable soup hearty enough for a main course.
instructions:
1. Sauté onion, garlic, carrots, and celery in olive oil for 5 minutes.
2. Add zucchini and tomatoes, cook 3 minutes.
3. Add broth and beans, bring to a boil.
4. Add pasta and cook until al dente.
5. Season with salt, pepper, and basil.
6. Serve with parmesan.

title: Cottage Cheese Pancakes
description: High-protein fluffy pancakes made with cottage cheese.
instructions:
1. Mix cottage cheese, eggs, milk, and vanilla in a bowl.
2. Stir in flour and baking powder until just combined.
3. Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat.
4. Pour small amounts of batter and cook 2-3 minutes per side.
5. Serve with honey and fresh fruit.

title: Beef Stir-Fry with Peppers
description: Sizzling beef and colorful peppers in a savory sauce.
instructions:
1. Slice beef thinly and marinate in soy sauce and cornstarch.
2. Heat oil in a wok until very hot.
3. Stir-fry beef until browned, about 3 minutes.
4. Add peppers, onion, garlic, and ginger.
5. Stir-fry 3 more minutes.
6. Add oyster sauce and toss everything together.
7. Serve immediately over rice.

title: Hummus and Veggie Wrap
description: Quick lunch wrap with creamy hummus and crunchy vegetables.
instructions:
1. Spread hummus generously over the tortilla.
2. Layer spinach, sliced cucumber, carrots, and red onion.
3. Crumble feta on top.
4. Squeeze lemon juice over filling.
5. Roll tightly and cut in half.
6. Serve with extra hummus for dipping.

title: Potato and Leek Soup
description: Velvety, comforting soup made from pantry and fridge staples.
instructions:
1. Sauté leeks and onion in butter for 5 minutes.
2. Add garlic and thyme, cook 1 minute.
3. Add diced potatoes and broth.
4. Simmer 20 minutes until potatoes are tender.
5. Blend until smooth.
6. Stir in cream and season.
7. Serve with crusty bread.

title: Tuna Salad Sandwich
description: Classic tuna salad on whole grain bread.
instructions:
1. Drain tuna and flake into a bowl.
2. Mix with mayonnaise, diced celery, onion, lemon juice, and mustard.
3. Season with salt and pepper.
4. Toast bread if desired.
5. Layer tuna salad on bread with lettuce and tomato.
6. Serve immediately.

title: Vegetable Frittata
description: Oven-baked egg dish loaded with seasonal vegetables.
instructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Sauté onion, peppers, and zucchini in olive oil for 5 minutes.
3. Whisk eggs with milk, salt, and pepper.
4. Pour egg mixture over vegetables in an oven-safe pan.
5. Top with cherry tomatoes and feta.
6. Bake 18-20 minutes until set.
7. Garnish with basil and serve.
